items.name: Cosco Scorer Kashmir Willow
items.description: Ultra-budget Kashmir willow bat for recreational and gully cricket.

common_complaints: Limited power compared to higher-grade bats
standout_qualities: Durable enough for casual and backyard play

items.name: SG Opener LE Kashmir Willow

fit_profile.not_for_persona: Advanced club players or competitive cricketers needing high power and responsiveness for match play.

Lacks the refined feel for advanced stroke play

Durable construction suitable for casual use and practice
